2604.18210.title: TacticGen: Grounding Adaptable and Scalable Generation of Football Tactics
2604.18210.paper_summary: Success in association football relies on both individual skill and coordinated tactics. While recent advancements in spatio-temporal data and deep learning have enabled predictive analyses like trajectory forecasting, the development of tactical design remains limited. Bridging this gap is essential, as prediction reveals what is likely to occur, whereas tactic generation determines what should occur to achieve strategic objectives. In this work, we present TacticGen, a generative model for adaptable and scalable tactic generation. TacticGen formulates tactics as sequences of multi-agent movements and interactions conditioned on the game context. It employs a multi-agent diffusion transformer with agent-wise self-attention and context-aware cross-attention to capture cooperative and competitive dynamics among players and the ball. Trained with over 3.3 million events and 100 million tracking frames from top-tier leagues, TacticGen achieves state-of-the-art precision in predicting player trajectories. Building on it, TacticGen enables adaptable tactic generation tailored to diverse inference-time objectives through classifier guidance mechanism, specified via rules, natural language, or neural models. Its modeling performance is also inherently scalable. A case study with football experts confirms that TacticGen generates realistic, strategically valuable tactics, demonstrating its practical utility for tactical planning in professional football. The project page is available at: https://shengxu.net/TacticGen/.
2604.18210.paper_summary_zh: 成功的足球運動依賴於個人技能和協調戰術。雖然最近在時空數據和深度學習方面的進展使得預測分析如軌跡預測成為可能，但戰術設計的發展仍然有限。彌補這一差距至關重要，因為預測揭示了可能發生的情況，而戰術生成則決定了為了實現戰略目標應該發生的情況。在這項工作中，我們提出了TacticGen，一種可調整和可擴展的戰術生成生成模型。TacticGen將戰術表述為基於比賽上下文的多智能體運動和互動序列。它採用多智能體擴散Transformer，具有智能體自注意力和上下文感知的交叉注意力，以捕捉球員和球之間的合作與競爭動態。TacticGen在來自頂級聯賽的330萬個事件和1億個追蹤幀的訓練下，實現了預測球員軌跡的最先進精度。在此基礎上，TacticGen通過分類器引導機制，根據規則、自然語言或神經模型指定，實現了針對多樣推理時間目標的可調整戰術生成。其建模性能也具有內在的可擴展性。一項與足球專家的案例研究確認，TacticGen生成了現實且具有戰略價值的戰術，展示了其在職業足球戰術規劃中的實用性。項目頁面可在以下網址訪問：https://shengxu.net/TacticGen/。
2604.18210.author: Sheng Xu et.al.
2604.18210.authors: Sheng Xu, Guiliang Liu, Tarak Kharrat, Yudong Luo, Mohamed Aloulou, Javier López Peña, Konstantin Sofeikov, Adam Reid, Paul Roberts, Steven Spencer, Joe Carnall, Ian McHale, Oliver Schulte, Hongyuan Zha, Wei-Shi Zheng
